group.name: OptionsMenu
group.str: Change Controls for Player 1 and Player 2!
Change Gameplay options such as Downscroll, Scroll Speed, Naughtyness...
Change more advanced options such as Streaming Audio...
Change Appearance options such as Flashing menus...
Change more advanced options such as VRAM-Only Sprites, Antialiasing, Shaders
Change the language that the engine uses.
Use this menu to reset save data or engine settings.

group.name: AppearanceOptions
group.str: If unchecked, will disable menu flashing when you select an option in the Main Menu, and other flashes will be slower.
If unchecked, the game will use the original red/green health bar from the week 6 fnf game.
If checked, Week 6 or other pixel stages will have a pixel perfect effect to it enabled, aligning every pixel on the screen.

group.name: AppearanceOptionsAdvanced
group.str: Quality modes to choose, "LOW" = Disable every heavy visual effects, "HIGH" = Enable all visual effects, "CUSTOM" = Allow custom options.
If unchecked, will disable antialiasing on every sprite to boost performance.
If checked, will disable certain background elements in stages to reduce memory usage.
If unchecked, gameplay shaders won't be loaded; helpful on weak devices.
If checked, stores bitmaps only in GPU, freeing memory (EXPERIMENTAL).

group.name: GameplayOptions
group.str: If checked, notes will go from up to down instead of down to up.
If unchecked, hitting a strum with no note causes a miss.
If unchecked, will censor Week 7 cutscenes or more.
If unchecked, stops the camera from zooming every 4 beats.
If checked, switching windows will pause the game.
Changes only the volume of the music.
Changes only the volume of the SFX.
Changes the offset that songs should start with.

group.name: GameplayOptionsAdvanced
group.str: Changes the base resolution of the game window.
If checked, music uses streamed audio to free memory (EXPERIMENTAL).
If checked, vocals will also be streamed. Recommended off unless necessary.

group.name: MiscOptions
group.str: Select this option to force a crash for debugging.
If checked, includes nightly builds in update checks.
Manually check for new engine updates.
Enables developer features like editors and console.
Enables popups for modpack issues like missing configs.
WARNING: Deletes all progress and settings. Cannot be undone.
